lever: deterministic initial column-norm ordering for the real one-sided Jacobi SVD core

benchmark_gate.command_baseline: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi-baseline-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --quick --noplot
benchmark_gate.command_candidate: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi-candidate-profile-3 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --quick --noplot

secondary_sanity.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-poyvi-candidate-svd-confirm cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/svd_48x48_f64 --quick --noplot
secondary_sanity.note: Cross-worker timing is not used for the keep score.

behavior_proof.observable_contract: SVD observable behavior is singular values in descending order, deterministic tie handling, U/V orthonormality, reconstruction parity, dtype/shape/error surface, and RNG absence. Internal Jacobi column order is not public behavior.
behavior_proof.ordering_and_ties: Initial preconditioner orders columns by descending initial norm using f64::total_cmp; equal norms break by original column index. Final singular values are still sorted descending by the existing col_norm total_cmp sort.
behavior_proof.floating_point: This lever intentionally changes the internal Jacobi sweep path. Public floating-point parity is therefore proven by the existing real-SVD tolerance contract: singular spectrum matches the row-major scalar reference within 1e-12*(1+abs(sigma)); reconstruction and orthonormality are checked within 1e-11.
behavior_proof.unsafe: No unsafe block is introduced; crate-level forbid(unsafe_code) remains active.
